spec_match.rationale: Correctly illustrates that text-decoration-skip-spaces follows the decoration origin by allowing independent controls for short links, long links, and highlighted spans.

interactive.rationale: Features clear interactive button matrices for each of the three elements, instantly updating decoration properties and refreshing a live code block.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Aligned with parent description: short links, long links, and highlighted spans are combined and configured independently.

edge_cases.rationale: Addresses the critical spec edge case of overlapping, mixed-origin element decorations (e.g. nested underlines alongside overlines) excellently.

references.rationale: Includes direct internal see also links to companion concept pages.

design_system.rationale: Excellent design system conformance, utilizing appropriate buttons, crumb navigation, and CSS variable combinations.

openQuestions.title: Add on-page specification and MDN references
openQuestions.detail: While the see also section points to other internal concepts, it is missing direct external references to the CSS Text Decoration 4 spec or MDN documentation, which would be helpful for developers studying decoration origins.

summary: A highly compliant, original, and instructive concept demo that teaches a subtle spec truth: skip-spaces follows decoration origins, not text flows. Fully interactive, beautiful styled, and adheres nicely to all repository conventions.
